name: Improve Credit LLC
description_short: Improve Credit LLC is a credit repair provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 4.7/5 with 30 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Improve Credit LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 30 reviews, Improve Credit LLC has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Charlotte area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit counseling service, Improve Credit LLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Charlotte, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Improve Credit LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Improve Credit LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
